title: Poor But Beautiful
writer: Dino Risi, Pasquale Festa Campanile, Massimo Franciosa
actors: Marisa Allasio, Maurizio Arena, Renato Salvatori
plot: Romolo and Salvatore are two young men who are neighbors and friends. They live with their parents in Piazza Navona in Rome. They are poor but handsome, and both fall in love with the beautiful Giovanna.
